description: APInf was an API management platform associated with FIWARE and an open-source GitHub repository. The available public information suggests the hosted service at apinf.io is no longer operational or at least does not expose a discoverable public developer integration surface on that domain.
summary: No confirmed public developer integration surfaces found for apinf.io itself; available materials point to a discontinued API-management product and self-hosted/open-source deployment docs rather than a live public API, GraphQL endpoint, MCP server, or CLI on the domain.
